extraction.one_line_summary: BARGHEE Warren soloed from 12-rider breakaway on final circuit climbs with ramps to 21%, held off late chasers Pogacar/Evenepoel by 10 seconds
tactical_patterns: UAE Emirates surrendered chase control mid-race when Benjamin Thomas (GC threat at +1:08) sat in 12-rider break threatening overall.
Pogacar/Evenepoel/Vingegaard launched GC attack after UAE exhausted themselves chasing, but missed corner and lost coordination attempting time gain.
Barghee delayed final move until last circuit climbs after teammate Rousseau sacrificed for earlier pace-setting in breakaway.

rider_signals.BARGHEE Warren: positive: first win in 5 years on 21% ramps suggests rediscovered climbing form at age 30
rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: negative: missed critical corner during GC attack, struggled most of three chasers to regain contact with Pogacar
rider_signals.POGACAR Tadej: positive: UAE exhausted but still strong enough to attack late and recover fastest from missed corner
rider_signals.THOMAS Benjamin: neutral: sat in threatening break at +1:08 GC but couldn't contest final climbs when pace went nuclear
rider_signals.PORTE Richie: positive: described as lively despite finishing same time as GC contenders, unexpected at this career stage
